retrieved_result: How do I get a Windows application to start automatically on login, and start minimized? "Helping people with computers... one answer at a time. Ask Leo! » Windows » Windows Configuration Windows has a convenient mechanism to set programs to start automatically when you login. We'll look at that, as well as customizations like minimize.by Leo A. Notenboom, © 2010I downloaded and activat
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result focuses on configuring Windows startup behavior, not on integrated development environments (IDEs) or top IDEs for software development.
